# ZROKY file-size lint whitelist (Rule 3 - ZROKY-Q1-90DAY-PLAN.md)
#
# Files listed here exceed the 30 KB limit but are accepted until their
# split ticket ships. When the split lands, DELETE the entry; that is the
# proof the ticket is done.
#
# Format: one POSIX-relative path per line (from repo root). Comments on same
# line after the path are ignored.
#
# Adding a NEW entry requires a ticket reference comment.
# Entries with no matching file produce a stale-whitelist warning (non-failing).
#
# MVP split queue (ZROKY-MVP-SPLIT-ROUTES): these route modules predate the
# verified-action MVP slice and must be split before paid GA.
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/regression_ci.py # ZROKY-MVP-SPLIT-ROUTES
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/outcomes.py # ZROKY-MVP-SPLIT-ROUTES
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/outcome_saved_reconciliation.py # ZROKY-MVP-SPLIT-ROUTES
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/auth.py # ZROKY-MVP-SPLIT-ROUTES
zroky-backend/app/api/routes/_internal/owner_launch_readiness_builder.py # ZROKY-MVP-SPLIT-ROUTES
